items.front: Surveillance or flight data outage: what can electronic flight data be used for?
items.back: To support SITUATIONAL AWARENESS ONLY while the facility transitions to alternate automation capabilities or nonradar procedures. Not for radar separation. Per 13-1-16.
1. Special Activity Airspace (SAA). 2. Airport Stream Filters (ASF). 3. Adapted restrictions. Per 13-1-17(a).

items.front: SAA Airspace Status View activation: does it equal coordination?
items.back: NO, unless otherwise covered in an LOA or facility directive. Activation or scheduling alone does NOT constitute coordination for activation of airspace. Per 13-1-17 NOTE.

items.front: Airspace Configuration Elements: two duties when assigned as sector responsibility
items.back: 1. Update elements to reflect current status. 2. Notify the operations supervisor when status has been modified. Per 13-1-17(b-c).
